title: THE FRIENDSHIP (ஒவன் மற்றும் மசீ) - மாதிரித் தேர்வு
subject: english

questions.question: On what date did the tsunami strike? / சுனாமி தாக்கிய தேதி எது?
questions.explanation: The Indian Ocean tsunami struck on December 26, 2004.

questions.question: In which country did Owen live? / ஒவன் எந்த நாட்டில் வாழ்ந்தது?
questions.explanation: The story takes place in Kenya, an African country.

questions.question: What animal is Owen? / ஒவன் என்பது எந்த விலங்கு?
questions.explanation: Owen is a baby hippopotamus.

questions.question: What caused the hippos to be carried away? / நீர்யானைகள் அடித்துச் செல்லப்படக் காரணம் என்ன?
questions.explanation: The massive tsunami waves carried the hippos away.

questions.question: Where was the baby hippo found? / குட்டி நீர்யானை எங்கே காணப்பட்டது?
questions.explanation: It was found stranded on some rocks after the waves receded.

questions.question: What was Owen's weight in kilograms? / ஒவனின் எடை கிலோகிராமில் எவ்வளவு?
questions.explanation: Owen weighed about 600 pounds, which is approximately 270 kg.

questions.question: The baby hippo was named after whom? / நீர்யானைக்கு யாருடைய பெயர் வைக்கப்பட்டது?
questions.explanation: He was named Owen after the man who caught and rescued him.

questions.question: What is the age of Mzee? / மசீயின் வயது என்ன?
questions.explanation: Mzee is a giant tortoise who was 130 years old.

questions.question: Mzee is a giant ________. / மசீ ஒரு மாபெரும் ________.
questions.explanation: Mzee is a giant Aldabra tortoise.

questions.question: Why did Owen hide behind Mzee? / ஒவன் ஏன் மசீயின் பின்னால் ஒளிந்து கொண்டது?
options: b) Mzee looked like his mother
c) He was afraid of people
questions.answer: b) Mzee looked like his mother
questions.explanation: Mzee's large grey shape reminded Owen of his mother.

questions.question: Mzee taught Owen to eat ________. / மசீ ஒவனுக்கு எதை உண்ணக் கற்றுக்கொடுத்தது?
questions.explanation: Mzee showed Owen how to eat natural food like grass.

questions.question: The bond was between a mammal and a ________. / இது ஒரு பாலூட்டிக்கும் ________ க்கும் இடையிலான பிணைப்பு.
questions.explanation: Owen (a hippo) is a mammal, and Mzee (a tortoise) is a reptile.

questions.question: What does 'Astonished' mean? / 'Astonished' என்பதன் பொருள் என்ன?
questions.explanation: Astonished means to be extremely surprised or amazed.

questions.question: Which of these is a water sport? / இவற்றில் எது ஒரு நீர் விளையாட்டு?
questions.explanation: Scuba diving is an underwater sport.

questions.question: What is the group name for 'ship, yacht, ferry'? / 'கப்பல், படகு' ஆகியவற்றின் குழு பெயர் என்ன?
questions.explanation: These are all vehicles used for transport on water.

questions.question: Owen and Mzee became ________. / ஒவனும் மசீயும் ________ ஆனார்கள்?
questions.explanation: They formed a very close and unusual bond of friendship.

questions.question: Where can we find Owen's videos today? / இன்று ஒவனின் வீடியோக்களை எங்கே காணலாம்?
questions.explanation: Videos and news about them are widely available on the internet.

questions.question: What does 'Frightened' mean? / 'Frightened' என்பதன் பொருள் என்ன?
questions.explanation: Frightened means feeling fear or being afraid.

questions.question: The synonym of 'Rescue' is... / 'Rescue' என்பதன் இணைச்சொல் என்ன?
questions.explanation: To rescue means to save something or someone from danger.

questions.question: Eel and Seahorse are ________. / விலாங்கு மீன் மற்றும் கடல் குதிரை ஆகியவை ________.
questions.explanation: These are animals that live in the sea.

questions.question: How many pounds did Owen weigh? / ஒவனின் எடை எத்தனை பவுண்டுகள்?
questions.explanation: The story mentions he weighed 600 pounds.

questions.question: What does 'Slippery' mean? / 'Slippery' என்பதன் பொருள் என்ன?
questions.explanation: Something slippery is hard to grip or hold because it's wet or smooth.

questions.question: Who wrestled Owen to the ground? / ஒவனை தரையில் வீழ்த்திப் பிடித்தது யார்?
questions.explanation: A man named Owen Sobien was the one who wrestled the hippo to rescue him.

questions.question: Mzee was initially ________ by Owen. / ஒவனின் செயலால் மசீ முதலில் ________ அடைந்தது.
questions.explanation: The old tortoise was surprised when a hippo suddenly cuddled close.

questions.question: Albatross and Pelican are ________. / அல்பட்ராஸ் மற்றும் பெலிகன் ஆகியவை ________.
questions.explanation: Albatross and pelicans are birds typically found near the sea.

questions.question: What did Owen copy from Mzee? / ஒவன் மசீயிடமிருந்து எதைப் பின்பற்றியது?
questions.explanation: Owen copied Mzee and learned what and how to eat.

questions.question: Where do hippos usually swim? / நீர்யானைகள் வழக்கமாக எங்கே நீந்தும்?
questions.explanation: Hippos are semi-aquatic and swim in rivers and oceans.

questions.question: Mzee is a word that refers to the ________. / மசீ என்ற சொல் எதைக் குறிக்கிறது?
questions.explanation: Mzee means 'old man' in Swahili, and it's the tortoise's name.

questions.question: Which of these is a sea product? / இவற்றில் எது ஒரு கடல் பொருள்?
questions.explanation: Corals are marine organisms often collected as sea products.

questions.question: Is the story of Owen and Mzee fictional or real? / இது ஒரு கற்பனைக் கதையா அல்லது உண்மையானதா?
questions.explanation: This is a world-famous true story of friendship between a hippo and a tortoise.
